title: SDACS — Swarm Drone Airspace Control System
description: APF (Artificial Potential Field) + WebGPU-based swarm drone airspace control automation system. Achieves 97.8% collision resolution rate with 90-second preemptive prediction, validated across 38,400 Monte Carlo simulations. Capstone design project at Mokpo National University (2026).
notes: Capstone Design final presentation: 2026-04-23. Repository auto-archives on GitHub Release tag. For citation, use the DOI provided by Zenodo once the first release is tagged.
